pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: chapter05.html
  standalone: true
  toc: true
  number-sections: true
  title-prefix: All of Business
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  number-offset:
    - 5
  variables: {}
  
metadata
  crossref:
    chapters: true
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  theme:
    light: cosmo
    dark: darkly
  sidebar:
    style: floating
  title: "[5]{.chapter-number}\_ [To do]{.chapter-title}"
  hide-description: true
